summary: Iteration 3 retest focused on signup redirect fix. All 7 test cases pass. The sessionStorage-based redirect pattern works correctly: new users are redirected to /app/reports/{demo_report_id}/preview after signup, demo banner visible with CTA and dismiss, login regression unaffected, KPI cards show valid values, short password validation works on both frontend and backend.
seed_data_creation: Created regressiontest1774818190@test.com during signup redirect test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Signup redirect fix (sessionStorage pattern) confirmed working. Backend 100%, Frontend 100%. No outstanding issues.

test_results.1_signup_redirect: PASS - New user redirected to /app/reports/{id}/preview after signup
test_results.2_demo_banner_cta: PASS - 'Create Real Report' CTA navigates to /app/reports/new
test_results.4_login_regression: PASS - Login goes to /app dashboard, not demo preview
test_results.5_kpi_values: PASS - All 5 KPI cards show valid numeric values (Total Spend $44,038.41, Total Leads 1415, etc.)
test_results.6_short_pw_frontend: PASS - 'Password must be at least 6 characters' error shown before submit
